description: The theme toggle button does not change the theme between light and dark modes when clicked. Instead, nothing happens visibly on the screen.
expectedOutcome: When the theme toggle button is clicked, the application should switch between light and dark themes, visibly changing the appearance of the interface.
hint: Search for the bug in ThemeContext.jsx and verify the logic handles the failing case correctly.
solution: The root cause is a logic error in src/context/ThemeContext.jsx. The fix should correct the condition or return value so the application behaves as expected. Verify the change resolves the failing scenario.
playwrightTests: Playwright tests should fail before the fix and pass after the fix for the same scenario.
playwrightTestSnippets: tests/app.spec.js - Playwright tests for fail-then-pass validation
